subject: [OOM-CERT-SERVICE][DCAE] Top up Cert Service containers
commit_message:
[OOM-CERT-SERVICE][DCAE] Top up Cert Service containers

Top up cert service container to 2.5.0

Issue-ID: OOM-2903
Signed-off-by: Tomasz Wrobel <tomasz.wrobel@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I297f14b89043f680add508dbf2b636edbc12cb61
